channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DHS Should Target Employers of Illegal Aliens, Not Appease Them
item.description: The agency should not collaborate with businesses to sustain a system that harms American workers and national sovereignty.

item.title: Trump Trade Rep Warns of More Tariffs as Levies Expire and Democrats Raise Cost Concerns
item.description: President Trump plans to maintain tariffs as a central economic tool despite legal challenges and Democratic criticism over rising prices.

item.title: Surrogate Mother Seeks Custody of Babies She Raised After Buyer Abandoned Them
item.description: The commercial surrogacy industry relies on contracts that can redefine motherhood and ignore the bonds formed during pregnancy.

item.title: How Woke Smithsonian Bureaucrats 'Killed America's Story'
item.description: "The National Museum of American History is no longer the nation's museum of American history," Spalding said.
